ddls:
CREATE TABLE "records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "createdby" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "createdbyname" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the record */,
  "createdbyyominame" TEXT /* Yomi name of the user who created the record */,
  "createdon" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "createdonbehalfby" INTEGER /* ID of the delegate user who created the record on behalf of another user */,
  "modifiedon" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last modified */,
  "modifiedby" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the record */,
  "modifiedbyname" TEXT /* Name of the user who last modified the record */,
  "modifiedbyyominame" TEXT /* Yomi name of the user who last modified the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_records_createdby FOREIGN KEY ("createdby") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_records_modifiedby FOREIGN KEY ("modifiedby") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_records_createdonbehalfby FOREIGN KEY ("createdonbehalfby") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, marketing) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the account belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the account */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Annual revenue of the account */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the account */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the account */,
  "primary_contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary contact for the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_primary_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the contact */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the contact */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account the contact belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "record_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "changedby" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changedon" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "field_changed" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Value of the field before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* Value of the field after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_changes_changedby FOREIGN KEY ("changedby") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_changes_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opportunities" (
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opportunity */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account associated with the opportunity */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact associated with the opportunity */,
  "estimated_value" TEXT /* Estimated value of the opportunity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the opportunity (e.g., open, closed, won, lost) */,
  "close_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual close date of the opportunity */,
  "probability" TEXT /* Probability of closing the opportunity (percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opportunity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opportunities_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opportunities_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account associated with the order */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact associated with the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered, canceled) */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual delivery date of the order */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product in the order */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the order item */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the order item (quantity * unit_price - discount) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sales team */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the team was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., salesperson, manager) */,
  "joined_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the member joined the team */,
  "left_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the member left the team (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES sales_teams ("team_id")
)
